message: 🌱 Add spire: spire-server: [AWS Node Attestor] Feature Request / mission (#620)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spire-4770-spire-server-aws-node-attestor-feature-request-enhancement-for-node-a",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spire: spire-server: [AWS Node Attestor] Feature Request / Enhancement for node attestation ",
+    "description": "spire-server: [AWS Node Attestor] Feature Request / Enhancement for node attestation . Requested by 4+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current spire deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your spire version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nhelm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working spire installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spire configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant spire configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire\n```\nHello Team 👋 \nHope you are well.\n\nWe are looking for a feature, where in we add one more check to node attestation flow."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for spire-server: [AWS Node Attestor] Feature Request /",
+        "description": "This PR adds new feature to AWS Node Attester Plugin. It's optional feature, if its enabled it provides additional check executed at very first step during node attestation. It verifies, if node's `aws account id` is part of `AWS Organization` or not. If it's not part of organization, attestation\n```yaml\naccount_ids_belong_to_org_validation = {\n        org_account_id     = \"7891011\"\n        org_account_role   = \"spire-server-org-role\"\n        org_account_region = \"us-west-2\"\n        org_account_map_ttl = \"6\"\n      }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"spire-server: [AWS Node Attestor] Feature Request /\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds new feature to AWS Node Attester Plugin. It's optional feature, if its enabled it provides additional check executed at very first step during node attestation. It verifies, if node's `aws account id` is part of `AWS Organization` or not. If it's not part of organization, attestation request will be rejected.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "account_ids_belong_to_org_validation = {\n        org_account_id     = \"7891011\"\n        org_account_role   = \"spire-server-org-role\"\n        org_account_region = \"us-west-2\"\n        org_account_map_ttl = \"6\"\n      }",
+        "account_ids_belong_to_org_validation = {\n        org_account_id     = \"7891011\"\n      }",
+        "org_account_role   = \"spire-server-org-role\" <---- use same role for node attestation \n        org_account_region = \"us-west-2\" <---- default region we agree on\n        org_account_map_ttl = \"6\" <--- default ttl if we go with existing route"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
